shots.reasoning_brief: Visual description of kindergarten and Shen Nian Ge holding Zhi Yu's hand; no dialogue or props; characters mapped from excerpt.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_PARENT
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 这个人怎么进的星辉？赞助费一年二十万，她穿得像刚从菜市场来的。

shots.reasoning_brief: Dialogue to friend (aliased as assistant in rule_output, but context is girlfriend); windbreaker mom visible; no props.
Visual actions of Shen Nian Ge hearing and holding hand; no dialogue; continuous scene from previous.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，你在想什么？

shots.reasoning_brief: Child speaking to mother; gaze upward; continuous outdoor scene.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 在想予予今天要好好表现。

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother responding to child; no props; same scene.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 放心吧！我最厉害了！

shots.reasoning_brief: Child responding confidently; continuous.
Scene change to classroom; multiple children/parents (approx 13 total); visual setup; cardinality approximate from 'ten several'.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 今天是我们中班的第一天，请小朋友们轮流做自我介绍好不好？先说名字，再说一个关于自己的秘密。

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher addressing group; no specific listener; classroom scene.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 大家好，我叫沈知予。小名予予。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child introducing self to class; standing straight from context.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 予予的秘密是什么呀？

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher questioning child specifically.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我爸爸是这个城市最厉害的人。但我还没见过他。等我找到他，他会变得很厉害。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child sharing secret to class; serious tone.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 予予的爸爸一定很了不起。那你有没有什么爱好呢？

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher responding gently after pause.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我喜欢画画。还有数学。100以内的加减法我都能算。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child listing hobbies.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 真的吗？那老师考考你。37加58等于多少？

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher testing child; visual transition to response.
Quick answer from child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 这个很简单呀。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child adding comment innocently.
Scene change to evening; visual of mother waiting, child running out; no dialogue.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪！今天老师说我是全班最聪明的！还给我多发了一颗小星星！

shots.reasoning_brief: Child excitedly sharing with mother.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 真棒。

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother praising while adjusting backpack; action on child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，我告诉你一个秘密。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child whispering secret to mother.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 什么秘密？

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother asking about secret.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我今天在幼儿园走廊上看到一张照片。挂在荣誉墙上。一个穿西装的男人，下面写着'陆氏集团总裁陆景琛先生捐赠'。妈咪——就是医院的那个叔叔！

shots.reasoning_brief: Child describing photo (prop PHOTO_01 mentioned but no handoff); to mother; '那个叔叔' maps to LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 嗯……可能是吧。

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother responding evasively; previous prop PHOTO_01 not handed off, no action.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我就知道！他就住在这个城市！妈咪，你今天不是去他上班的地方了吗？你有没有看到他？

shots.reasoning_brief: Child excited about father figure (LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN).

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 走了，公交车来了。

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother diverting; leading to bus.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，他既然捐赠了幼儿园，说明他是个好人。好人的话，应该不会不认自己的儿子吧？

shots.reasoning_brief: Child on bus, speculating about LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 查到了吗？

shots.reasoning_brief: Phone call; speaker offscreen but visible in context; to assistant.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: ZHAO_YIMING_ASSISTANT
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 查到了。陆总，那个孩子……确实在星辉。今天第一天入园。

shots.reasoning_brief: Assistant reporting on phone; child refers to SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 他今天说了什么？

shots.reasoning_brief: Follow-up question on phone.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: ZHAO_YIMING_ASSISTANT
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 他说……'我爸爸是这个城市最厉害的人。但还没见过他。'

shots.reasoning_brief: Assistant quoting child's words.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: ……知道了。

shots.reasoning_brief: Quiet acknowledgment on phone.

music_cues: 吉他轻拨，一丝暖意中带着悬念
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual of rearview mirror; music cue from excerpt; no dialogue; end of scene.
